name: MVP
summary: Ready to build the first working version. Adds a spec convention (/spec + FEAT-NNN with validated-learning + evals fields), a stack-configured build gate (/smoke), evals discipline (/evals — Husain), demand-testing discipline (/pretotype — Savoia), JIT design-tokens scaffolding (/design-tokens-init — Frost / Curtis), AI cost discipline (/ai-cost — cohort-aware budgets + per-call logger; v0.25), a devlog (/log), and a session-end ritual (/close + RESUME.md). Builders: tester + program-manager. Mentors: architect + GTM. Plus 4 named loops on the v0.18 primitive — spec-loop (encodes moment #4 restraint), pretotype-loop (Savoia), design-tokens-loop (IDEA-010), cost-budget-loop (Husain-applied-to-spend; v0.25).
graduationHint: When you have real users and the app needs design rigor, a real db, and prototypes — boss unlock v1.
